name: gofilestream
description: Go port of TG-FileStreamBot core — file to streaming/download link, Telegram bot.

BIN_CHANNEL_ACCESS_HASH.description: Optional — skips first-run channel discovery. Leave blank on first deploy, then copy the value the logs print once resolved and set it here for future deploys.

HASH_LENGTH.description: Length of the hash suffix on generated links

FQDN.description: Public domain Heroku gives this app, e.g. your-app-name.herokuapp.com

HAS_SSL.description: Heroku always terminates SSL for you — leave true

NO_PORT.description: Heroku's router doesn't need the port in the URL — leave true

CHANNEL_URL.description: Optional — shows a channel button on /start

SESSION_FILE.description: Optional — where the Telegram session is stored
